title: Template talk:Municipi of Rome - Wikipedia
body: This template does not require a rating on Wikipedia's content assessment scale. It is of interest to the following WikiProjects : Rome This template is within the scope of WikiProject Rome , a collaborative effort to improve the coverage of the city of Rome and ancient Roman history on Wikipedia. If you would like to participate, please visit the project page, where you can join the discussion and see a list of open tasks. Rome Wikipedia:WikiProject Rome Template:WikiProject Rome Rome Start a discussion about improving the Template:Municipi of Rome page Talk pages are where people discuss how to make content on Wikipedia the best that it can be. You can use this page to start a discussion with others about how to improve the " Template:Municipi of Rome " page.
